description_long: This nightstand features a modern, boxy design with clean lines and a natural light wood grain finish. The front face displays two spacious drawers with seamless, handle-less fronts, contributing to its minimalist aesthetic. The sides and back are plain, with the wood grain pattern continuing uninterrupted, emphasizing the simplicity of the form. The top surface is flat and broad, suitable for placing lamps, books, or other small items. The nightstand is elevated on four slender, black legs that provide a subtle contrast to the wood and add a touch of contemporary style. There are no visible decorative elements, making it suitable for a variety of urban and residential settings.
description: A modern, light wood nightstand with two handle-less drawers and slender black legs, featuring a minimalist, clean-lined design.
description_view_0: Front view showing two seamless drawers and the full width of the nightstand, highlighting the wood grain and minimalist design.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the plain wood panel with no visible drawers or handles, emphasizing the depth and leg structure.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a continuous wood grain panel with no openings or features, and the black legs visible at the base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, with a plain wood panel and visible leg structure.
attribute_placement_relative_to_other_ur: beside a bed or against a wall
